name: Front
description: Front — Shared inbox platform that brings email, SMS, and social into a collaborative team workspace.

seo.title: Front — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Front: Front — Shared inbox platform that brings email, SMS, and social into a collaborative team workspace.

when_to_use: Shared inbox for customer emails across a support team
SMS and social channels unified into a single team workspace
SLA-tracked collaborative email support with assignments
Internal comment threads on customer emails before replying
CRM-linked email context shown alongside incoming messages

pros: Unified email, SMS, and social inbox
cons: Overkill for pure ticket support flows
Mobile apps less polished than web
Learning curve for full workflow power
review.verdict: The best shared inbox for teams that live in email, pricey once you scale past a few seats.
review.best_for: Ops, success, and sales teams handling high-volume email collaboratively.
review.not_for: Classic helpdesk workflows better served by Zendesk or Intercom.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Per-seat plan; no explicit annual non-reducible commit evidence.
